'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 56''' was the fifty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 22]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Escape of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]
*[[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]]
*[[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen]] and [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Lars]]
*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] Worlds
*[[Mark X Executioner droid/Legends|Mark X Executioner Droid]]
*''[[Galaxy Gun]]''
*[[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']]
